name: ROONEY KIPROP
tagline: I'm Rooney Kiprop — a multi-disciplinary creative and tech enthusiast blending design, development, and storytelling. From crafting pixel-perfect visuals to building responsive websites, shooting cinematic footage to growing brands on social media, I bring ideas to life across every digital medium. I leverage cutting-edge AI tools to work smarter, faster, and more creatively in everything I do.

projects.title: BrandFlow Identity Kit
projects.description: Full brand identity (logo, colors, typography) for a Nairobi-based startup.

projects.title: KenVibe Social Campaign
projects.description: Grew a local brand's Instagram from 200 to 5K followers in 3 months.
